context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice-to-Task feature fully implemented. The /api/voice/parse-task endpoint takes {text: string} and returns TaskParseResponse with title, description, type (callback/follow_up/appointment/other), priority (low/medium/high), due_date (ISO), due_time (HH:MM). AI extracts these from natural language using gpt-4o-mini. Contact search now includes email in both backend query and frontend filter functions.
